allow: Bash(powershell -Command "if \(Test-Path ''C:\\laragon\\www\\quanlythuviennn\\storage\\app\\public\\reservation_proofs''\) { Get-ChildItem ''C:\\laragon\\www\\quanlythuviennn\\storage\\app\\public\\reservation_proofs'' -File | Select-Object -First 10 Name,Length,LastWriteTime } else { Write-Host ''Directory does not exist'' }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\laragon\\www\\quanlythuviennn\\public\\storage'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Mode,Target; if \(Test-Path ''C:\\laragon\\www\\quanlythuviennn\\public\\storage\\reservation_proofs''\) { Get-ChildItem ''C:\\laragon\\www\\quanlythuviennn\\public\\storage\\reservation_proofs'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name | Select-Object -First 3 } else { Write-Host ''No reservation_proofs dir in public/storage'' }")
